+------------------+
|  Authentication  |
|    +---------+   |
|    |  Login  |   |
|    +----+----+   |
|         |        |
|         v        |
|  +------------+  |
|  |  Validate  |  |
|  +------+-----+  |
|         |        |
|         |        |
|         |        |
+---------o--------+
          |
          |
          +-----+
+---------------o--+
|  Processing   |  |
|        |      |  |
|        v----+-+  |
|   +---------+    |
|   |  Parse  |    |
|   +----+----+    |
|        |         |
|        v         |
|  +-----------+   |
|  |  Execute  |   |
|  +-----------+   |
|                  |
|                  |
+------------------+
